array.string: S7=http://192.168.0.249:8080 GWTC=192.168.0.68 ADB="C:\\farm-services\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" LOG=/tmp/s7-settings-watchdog.log stamp(){ date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; } apply(){ wb=0; fm=0; or=0; pr=0 /usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 "$S7/settings/whitebalance?set=incandescent" >/dev/null 2>&1 && wb=1 /usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 "$S7/settings/focusmode?set=continuous-picture" >/dev/null 2>&1 && fm=1 /usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 "$S7/settings/orientation?set=portrait" >/dev/null 2>&1 && or=1 /usr/bin/curl -sS -m 5 "$S7/settings/photo_rotation?set=90" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pr=1 echo "$(stamp) settings wb=$wb fm=$fm or=$or pr=$pr" >> "$LOG"; } bytes=$(/usr/bin/curl -sS -m 15 "$S7/photoaf.jpg" -o /dev/null -w "%{size_download}" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) if [ "$bytes" -gt 10000 ]; then echo "$(stamp) frame_ok bytes=$bytes" >> "$LOG" apply else echo "$(stamp) black_screen bytes=$bytes — adb restart" >> "$LOG" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes markb@"$GWTC" \ "$ADB shell am force-stop com.pas.webcam 2>&1 && $ADB shell monkey -p com.pas.webcam -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1" >/dev/null 2>&1 \ && { echo "$(stamp) adb ok — sleeping 60s" >> "$LOG"; sleep 60; } \ || echo "$(stamp) adb unavailable — settings only" >> "$LOG" apply fi
